mapper.sql: su.id id, su.username username, su.password password, su.nickname nickname, su.sex sex, su.phone phone, su.h_img h_img, su.user_prefs user_prefs
mapper.select: SELECT , IFNULL(su.account_status,'1') account_status FROM app_user su WHERE TRIM(su.username) = TRIM(#{USERNAME}) AND su.password = #{PASSWORD} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_user WHERE TRIM(IFNULL(username,'')) = TRIM(#{username})
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_user WHERE TRIM(IFNULL(username,'')) = TRIM(#{username}) AND CAST(id AS CHAR) != CAST(#{id} AS CHAR)
mapper.insert: insert into app_user ( username, password, nickname, sex, phone, h_img ,user_prefs ) values ( #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{sex}, #{phone}, #{h_img} ,#{user_prefs} )
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET account_status = #{account_status} WHERE id = #{id}
